headline: Elixir completes Teelba seismic survey at Taroom Trough permit
summary: Elixir Energy Ltd (ASX:EXR, OTC:ELXPF) has completed its Teelba 2D seismic survey at ATP2057 in Queensland’s Taroom Trough, with the program finished on schedule and on budget. 225 kilometres of modern high-resolution 2D seismic had been acquired across some of its most prospective western...

headline: Conflict Without Closure
summary: U.S. stocks slide into correction as Iran conflict fuels volatility, energy jitters, and rising rates hit REITs.
